title: BBA (Hons. with Research) Tourism and Travel
content: BBA in Tourism and Travel provide knowledge, competence, and skills in the professional area of tourism at the Bachelor’s Degree level. This course aims to impart to the students with fundamental and hands-on knowledge of tour operations and other allied services. The Program focuses on research-based learning. *4-year Undergraduate Degree (Honours with Research) Course Category | Credits | Common Core | 54 | Specialisation Core | 18 | Specialisation Elective | 18 | VAD | 8 | AEC | 12 | Community Service Project | 2 | Internship | 5 | Industrial Research Project | 3 | Total | 120 | 4-year UG Degree with Honours (Source: - UGC Curriculum & Credit Framework for Undergraduate Programmes) XII with minimum 50% marks in Aggregate Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 01 Excel as skilled service professionals in travel agencies, tour operations, and hospitality sectors, delivering exceptional customer experiences and managing daily operations effectively. 02 Champion responsible tourism practices and cultural sensitivity, contributing to sustainable destination development and community engagement initiatives within the tourism ecosystem. 03 Adapt to emerging trends and digital innovations in the travel and tourism industry, pursuing continuous professional growth to advance into supervisory or specialized marketing/ operations roles. 01 Evaluate comprehensive travel and tourism packages, services, and marketing strategies, considering market trends, customer needs, and ethical tourism practices. 02 Manage various operational aspects of the tourism and hospitality sector, including destination management, tour operations, and customer relationship management, ensuring high-quality service delivery. 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08
